name: ephemeros
description: Ephemeral Context Bridge prototype for IBM Bob.

scripts.docker:run:mock: docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 -e EPHEMEROS_HOST=0.0.0.0 -e EPHEMEROS_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED=true -e EPHEMEROS_MOCK_CONTEXT=true ephemeros
scripts.docker:run:secure: docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 -e EPHEMEROS_HOST=0.0.0.0 -e EPHEMEROS_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED=true -e EPHEMEROS_MOCK_CONTEXT=true -e EPHEMEROS_CONTEXT_SOURCE=secure-enclave -e EPHEMEROS_FILTER_PROVIDER=local ephemeros
scripts.docker:run:vpn-check: docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 -e EPHEMEROS_HOST=0.0.0.0 -e EPHEMEROS_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED=true -e EPHEMEROS_MOCK_CONTEXT=true -e EPHEMEROS_CONTEXT_SOURCE=vpn-check -e EPHEMEROS_VPN_TEST_URL ephemeros
